title: GOOD: dual opt-in guard for testnet integration test
description: The testnet e2e test has two independent skip conditions: #[ignore] (requires --ignored flag on cargo test) and TESTNET_ENABLED=1 env var check at runtime. Either alone is fragile: --ignored can be passed accidentally in CI configs; env var checks can be forgotten if someone adds the flag. Both together mean a CI pipeline must both explicitly request ignored tests AND set the env var before the test touches the network. The test also provides clear error messages when vars are missing, not a panic.
close_reason: Review finding acknowledged — existing implementation is correct, no change needed
